description: Apple App Architect hooks — session reminders and agent context injection

hooks.command: echo 'Toolkit reminder: apple-app-architect active. Load app-development-workflow to start. Available: /brainstorm, /write-plan, /execute-plan, /feature-dev. Target: Swift 6.2, iOS 26, macOS .v26.'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SubagentStart","additionalContext":"Project targets: Swift 6.2, macOS .v26, iOS 26. Enforce @MainActor isolation on UI code. Prefer @Observable over ObservableObject. Use Liquid Glass APIs where applicable."}}'
